headline: Eli Lilly Faces Actos RICO Class Action And Investor Cash Flow Questions
summary: A US court has certified a nationwide third party payor class in a lawsuit involving Eli Lilly’s former diabetes drug Actos. The case alleges concealment of Actos’ bladder cancer risk and claims violations of the Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organizations Act. Class certification expands the potential claimant pool to thousands of payors and raises the prospect of material financial and reputational impact for NYSE:LLY. Eli Lilly, trading on the NYSE under the ticker LLY, now faces this...
